title: Data Ethics & Privacy
subtitle: Neural data is the most intimate form of personal property. Our privacy framework is uncompromising.

guardian.title: The "School-as-Guardian" Model
guardian.desc: We operate strictly B2B. Every student must be enrolled and verified by a school. The institution remains the legal and ethical steward of students' neural data. We never commercialize or sell neural data.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Protection
collaborative.desc: We partner with schools to create a fortified, closed-loop environment. Data flows from student to school-controlled infrastructure only.

deletion.title: Data Deletion
deletion.desc: At the end of every semester, student neural models and session data are deleted per mandated protocols. Schools and students retain full control.
